title: FreizeitparkCraft
description: This modpack is built for players who love creativity, automation, and architectural freedom – perfect for designing and building massive theme parks in Minecraft 1.20.1.
body:
With a strong focus on mechanical systems, detailed building options, and visual design tools, you can create everything from fully functional roller coasters and rides to cozy food stalls, decorative pathways, and immersive park environments. Dynamic lighting, animated elements, and custom decorations allow you to shape every corner of your world just the way you imagine it.

Whether you're dreaming of a modern amusement park, a spooky haunted fair, or a fantasy-themed wonderland, this pack gives you the freedom to bring it all to life. Ideal for both solo builders and multiplayer experiences, the modpack is optimized for smooth gameplay while offering endless possibilities for creativity.
